parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](ref:authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account. Found on the [Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 characters).

merchant_entity_id.description: The merchant's own identifier for this entity, used for reconciliation.

national_entity.description: The type of entity being created.

number.description: The phone number without the country code.

address_line_2.description: The secondary address line (apartment, suite, etc.).

entity_detail.description: The detailed information for the entity. Provide either `individual` or `entity` based on the `national_entity` value.

individual.description: Individual person details. Required when `national_entity` is `INDIVIDUAL`.

tax_information.description: Tax identification records for the individual.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the document ([ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)).

issued_at.description: The date the document was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).

entity.description: Business or organization details. Required when `national_entity` is `ENTITY`.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

beneficial_owners.description: The beneficial owners of the business entity.

tax_information.description: Tax identification records for the owner.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the document.

issued_at.description: The date the document was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).

ownership_percentage.description: The percentage of ownership in the business (0-100).

title.description: The owner's title or role in the organization.

items.example: compliance_declaration is required for ONE_STEP onboarding

messages: compliance_declaration is required for ONE_STEP onboarding

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the entity obtained from [Create Entity](ref:create-entity).

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](ref:authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account (UUID, 36 characters).

yuno_connection_id.description: The pre-configured Banking Connectivity provider connection identifier.

onboarding_type.description: The onboarding workflow type. `ONE_STEP` submits all information at once for provider processing. `PREVIOUSLY_ONBOARDED` generates an internal Yuno ID without contacting the provider.

compliance_declaration.description: Legal agreements accepted by the entity. Required for `ONE_STEP` onboarding.

accepted.description: Whether the terms of service were accepted.

accepted_ip.description: The IP address from which the terms were accepted.

accepted.description: Whether the privacy policy was accepted.

version.description: The version of the privacy policy accepted.

accepted_ip.description: The IP address from which the policy was accepted.

risk_assessment.description: Pre-existing compliance screening results provided by the merchant.

assessed_at.description: The timestamp when the assessment was performed (ISO 8601).

is_pep.description: Whether the entity is a PEP.

position.description: The political role or position, if applicable.

assessed_by.description: The name of the assessor or team.

appears_on_sanctions_list.description: Whether the entity appears on any sanctions list.

sanctions_list_name.description: The name of the sanctions list, if matched.

screened_at.description: The timestamp when the screening was performed (ISO 8601).

source_of_funds.description: AML/KYC information about the source of funds.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the source of funds.
description.example: Primary income from full-time employment as software engineer, supplemented by stock portfolio dividends

documentation.description: KYC/KYB documents. Each item uses a `type` discriminator to determine which sub-object to populate. Supported types: `IDENTITY_DOCUMENT`, `PROOF_OF_ADDRESS`, `BANK_STATEMENT`, `BUSINESS_DOCUMENT`, `TAX_INFORMATION`, `FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT`, `BIOMETRIC_VERIFICATION`, `EMPLOYMENT_INFORMATION`.

identity_document.description: Identity document details. Provide when `type` is `IDENTITY_DOCUMENT`.

front_image.description: The front image of the document.

back_image.description: The back image of the document.

proof_of_address.description: Proof of address details. Provide when `type` is `PROOF_OF_ADDRESS`.

provider_name.description: The utility or service provider name.

account_number.description: The account number with the provider.

verified_address.description: The address shown on the document.

bank_statement.description: Bank statement details. Provide when `type` is `BANK_STATEMENT`.

account_number_last_4.description: Last 4 digits of the account number.

business_document.description: Business document details. Provide when `type` is `BUSINESS_DOCUMENT`.

tax_information.description: Tax information details. Provide when `type` is `TAX_INFORMATION`.

financial_document.description: Financial document details. Provide when `type` is `FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT`.

audited.description: Whether the document has been audited.

biometric_verification.description: Biometric verification details. Provide when `type` is `BIOMETRIC_VERIFICATION`.

employment_information.description: Employment information details. Provide when `type` is `EMPLOYMENT_INFORMATION`.

annual_income.description: The annual income from this employment.

source_of_funds.description: Primary income from full-time employment as software engineer, supplemented by stock portfolio dividends

items.example: Onboarding has reached a terminal status and cannot be updated

messages: Onboarding has reached a terminal status and cannot be updated

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the entity obtained from [Create Entity](ref:create-entity).

parameters.name: onboarding_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the onboarding obtained from [Create Entity Onboarding](ref:create-entity-onboarding).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account (UUID, 36 characters).

description.example: Primary income from full-time employment, supplemented by investment portfolio

documentation.description: Additional or updated KYC/KYB documents. Uses the same structure as [Create Entity Onboarding](ref:create-entity-onboarding).

source_of_funds.description: Primary income from full-time employment, supplemented by investment portfolio

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the entity obtained from [Create Entity](ref:create-entity).

parameters.name: onboarding_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the onboarding obtained from [Create Entity Onboarding](ref:create-entity-onboarding).

id.description: The unique identifier of the Banking Connectivity account (prefixed `acct_`).

entity_id.description: The `id` of the entity associated with this account.

onboarding_id.description: The `id` of the onboarding used to create this account.

status.description: The current status of the account.

routing_number.description: The US routing number. Present for US-based accounts.

iban.description: The International Bank Account Number. Present for UK and EU accounts.

balance.description: The current balance information for the account.

available.description: The available balance that can be used for transfers.

current.description: The current total balance including pending transactions.

pending.description: The amount currently in pending transactions.

account_details.description: Additional account details and region-specific identifiers.

account_name.description: The display name for the account.

sort_code.description: The UK sort code. Present for UK-based accounts.

bsb.description: The Australian BSB number. Present for Australia-based accounts.

swift.description: The SWIFT/BIC code for international transfers.

payment_rails.description: The payment rails supported by this account.

incoming.description: Payment rails available for receiving funds.

outgoing.description: Payment rails available for sending funds.

supports_book_transfers.description: Whether the account supports internal (book) transfers between accounts on the same provider.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created (ISO 8601).

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated (ISO 8601).

items.example: Onboarding status must be SUCCEEDED to create an account

messages: Onboarding status must be SUCCEEDED to create an account

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](ref:authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account. Found on the [Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 characters).

onboarding_id.description: The `id` of a successful onboarding obtained from [Create Entity Onboarding](ref:create-entity-onboarding). The onboarding must have `status: SUCCEEDED`.

account_type.description: The type of bank account to create.

currency.description: The currency for the account ([ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217), 3 characters). Supported values depend on the provider region: `USD` (US), `GBP` (UK), `AUD` (Australia), `EUR` (EU).

messages: destination_account or destination_account_id must be provided

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](ref:authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account (UUID, 36 characters).

source_account_id.description: The `id` of the source Banking Connectivity account obtained from [Create Account](ref:create-account-baas).

destination_account_id.description: The `id` of the destination Banking Connectivity account for internal (book) transfers. Set to `null` for external transfers.

amount.description: The transfer amount. Currency must match the source account currency.

value.description: The transfer amount (up to 4 decimal places, max 9,999,999,999).

currency.description: The currency ([ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)). Must match the source account currency.

payment_rail.description: The payment rail to use for the transfer. Available rails depend on the provider region.

merchant_transfer_id.description: The merchant's own reference ID for reconciliation.

destination_account.description: The external destination account details. Required fields depend on the region: US requires `account_number` and `routing_number`; UK requires `iban` or `account_number` with `sort_code`; Australia requires `account_number` with `bsb`.

routing_number.description: The US routing number. Required for US destinations.

iban.description: The IBAN. Required for UK and SEPA destinations.

bsb.description: The Australian BSB number. Required for Australian destinations.

swift.description: The SWIFT/BIC code. Required for international and SEPA transfers.

sort_code.description: The UK sort code. Required for UK destinations.

parameters.description: The `id` of the entity obtained from [Create Entity](ref:create-entity)
